CHMS Cycle 4

Source: R/data.R
cycle4.Rd

This is synthetic data representing the fourth cycle of the Canadian Health Measures Survey (CHMS). The CHMS survey is conducted by Statistics Canada.

Value

cycle4

a data frame

Examples

data(cycle4)
str(cycle4)
#> 'data.frame':	1000 obs. of  4 variables:
#>  $ clc_age : int  50 34 70 33 22 61 69 73 62 56 ...
#>  $ clc_sex : int  2 2 1 1 1 2 2 2 1 1 ...
#>  $ bpmdpbps: int  118 123 104 201 82 141 77 194 186 202 ...
#>  $ bpmdpbpd: int  136 93 126 92 45 86 56 76 91 73 ...

On this page
